heading: Sharing of technology with Department of Defense
label: 2463 Sharing of technology with Department of Defense
text: The Administrator shall, in cooperation with the Secretary of Defense, establish procedures and programs to provide for the sharing of technology, technical capability, and expertise between the Administration and the Department of Defense to further national security objectives.
notes: Effective DateSection effective , see , set out as a note under .Mar. 1, 2000section 3299 of Pub. L. 106–65section 2401 of this title
